name: Teamshares Inc
business: Teamshares is a tech-enabled acquiror of high-quality businesses, intending to be a permanent home for businesses. Part holding company, part financial technology, Teamshares programmatically acquires companies with $0.5 to $5 million of earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization from retiring owners, integrates them with the Teamshares platform, and helps employees earn company stock.

exposures.sentence: Part holding company, part financial technology, Teamshares programmatically acquires companies with $0.5 to $5 million of earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization from retiring owners, integrates them with the Teamshares platform, and helps employees earn company stock.

catalysts.event: Closing of the Teamshares Business Combination, including the PIPE Investment
catalysts.sentence: The consummation of the Initial PIPE Investment is conditioned on the concurrent Closing and other customary closing conditions.

catalysts.event: Outside Date for termination of the Teamshares Merger Agreement
catalysts.sentence: If any of the conditions to Closing have not been satisfied or waived by May 31, 2026 (the Outside Date), the Teamshares Merger Agreement may be terminated.
